description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical wooden bucket or barrel with visible vertical wooden staves held together by two dark metal hoops, one at the top rim and one at the base. The wood is aged, showing a natural brown patina with some darker stains and weathering, and the metal bands are slightly rusted and fastened with round rivets. The exterior surface features a variety of black stenciled numbers and markings, some faded, suggesting prior use for inventory or industrial purposes. The interior is also wooden, with the same weathered appearance as the exterior, and the open top reveals the bucket is hollow. There are no visible handles or lid, and the construction appears robust, suitable for carrying or storing materials. The overall look is utilitarian and rustic, fitting for outdoor or industrial urban environments.
description: A weathered wooden bucket or barrel with dark metal hoops, stenciled numbers, and a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bucket's open top, prominent black stenciled numbers, and both metal hoops clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a mostly plain wooden surface with minimal markings and both metal hoops visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plainest side, with no visible markings and a clear view of the wood grain and hoops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows additional stenciled numbers and markings, with both hoops and wood texture visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: black stenciled numbers and faded markings
